common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: merchant_id
common_params.description: Shopee’s unique identifier for a merchant. Required for all merchant level requests(CB CNSC user calling global product related APIs).

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, merchant_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this call to get a list of brand. Only for China mainland sellers and Korean sellers.

request_params.name: offset
request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is 0. if data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.

request_params.name: status
request_params.description: Brand status , 1: normal brand, 2: pending brand.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: warning
response_params.description: Indicate waring details if hit waring. Empty if no waring happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking

children.name: has_next_page
children.description: This is to indicate whether the item list is more than one page. If this value is true, you may want to continue to check next page to retrieve the rest of items.

children.name: next_offset
children.description: If has_next_page is true, this value need set to next request.offset

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/global_product/get_brand_list?access_token=access_token&category_id=12345&merchant_id=merchant_id&offset=1&page_size=10&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&status=1&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: Add CNSC introduction in API description
